titleStmt.title: SII 26.345: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 345. (A.R. No. 326 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same shrine.
This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc.

It records a gift of nañjai land and fishing taxes to provide for repairs and drudging of the tank called Tirubhuvanamādēvippērēri of Kūvam alias Madhurāntakanallūr in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by the ūrār of the village. A number of signatories figure in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅkac cayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ ṉilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimaṉnavar Eriyalūṟṟilitarat tikkaṉaittun=taṉ cakkaranaṭātti viraciṅkācaṉattu Ulakuṭaiyā ḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 4 10 2 nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattuk kaṉṟūr nāṭṭuk kūvamākiya maturān=takanallūr Ūrom Eṅkaḷūr ttiripuvanamātevippererikku veṇṭumaḻivu corkaikku Ivveriyil tenkaṭaiyāluḷḷa nellum minpāṭṭattāluḷḷa vastuvum cantirāttitavarai celvatākak kuṭuttom koven=tan kulottuṅkacoḻanukku nāventu nāṟpattiraṇṭāṇṭiṟ kūvattā
cir niṟka minpāṭṭa n=tenkaṭai neṟkūṭṭat toṭerik keyin=tāricaintu .§ Ittan mattukku Aḻivu paṇṇuvār keṅkaiyiṭai kumariyiṭai ceytār ceytapāvam paṭuvār . § Ippaṭikku kuṟumuṭi nan=ti kaṇavatiyāna maturān=taka viḻupparayaneḻuttu .. Ippaṭikku kuṟumuṭi caṅkan=tāḻiyeḻuttu § Ippaṭikkiruṅkaṇūr kiḻavan Irācacun=taran vayiramekaneḻuttu . § Ippaṭikku Iruṅkaṉūr kiḻavan mātavan caṅkattaya- neḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kumārattan nan=ti
ceriyeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kumārattancerinan=tiyeḻuttu . § Ippaṭikkut tumpūr nakūḷan vaṭuka nāneḻuttu . Ippaṭikkuk koṭṭaipākkiḻān veḷān pañcaneti yeḻuttu . § Ippaṭikkuc celvan kuñciramallān maturān=takap perun=taccaneḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 26.345 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
